applied.title: Product Designer
applied.aiSuggestion: Review your portfolio case studies for audio interfaces.

screening.title: Senior Product Designer
screening.aiSuggestion: Prepare questions about their new roadmap feature.

interviewing.title: Design Advocate
interviewing.aiSuggestion: Send follow-up email in 2 days if no response.

offer.title: Senior Engineer
offer.aiSuggestion: Offer expires in 3 days. Negotiate equity package?
